title: Phase 3 Complete — All 7 Games Migrated
description: Every game now runs on LittleJS with full creative polish. 7/7 neon rewrites built, deployed, and QA-verified. Zero open bugs.

title: Pac-Man Phantom Maze Shipped
description: 828-line rewrite with ghost AI, fog of war mechanic, Web Audio siren, maze navigation, and hi-score persistence. The final Phase 3 game.

title: Frogger Neon Crossing Shipped
description: 666-line cyberpunk city rewrite with 5 levels, drone player, rain system, storm surge, lightning, emergency boost, fly-by bonus, and 7 zzfx sounds.

title: Space Invaders Last Frequency Shipped
description: 960-line rewrite — the biggest game yet. 5 waves, CRT post-processing, 3 alien types with pixel sprites, 4 destructible shields, UFO/Super UFO, ghost afterimages, 8 zzfx sounds.

title: Tetris Cascade Shipped
description: Tetris rewritten on LittleJS with cascade theme, combo system, particle effects, and progressive difficulty. 4/7 games migrated.

title: C-Level Accountability Reform
description: CISO, CPO, and CFO merged into Board agenda. CEO gets mandatory state management. CTO gains deploy-blocking authority. Board becomes truth enforcer.

title: CI Pipeline Expanded to 9 Checks
description: Added non-root container verification for both backend and frontend. All 9 checks passing: Dockerfile lint, npm audit, build, size checks, health, games, non-root.

title: Container Security Hardened
description: Both backend and frontend containers now run as non-root users (app and nginx respectively). Security audit confirmed.

title: Breakout Prism Shatter Shipped
description: 724-line rewrite with 5 level layouts, combo multipliers up to 3x, 3 power-ups, crystal shatter particles, and ball trail effects.

title: Pong Volt Rally Shipped
description: Pong rewritten on LittleJS with 4-stage rally progression, deuce mechanic, lightning effects, and match-point silence. CPO rated A tier (43/50).

title: Snake Neon Serpent Complete
description: Snake rewritten on LittleJS with 8-stage progression, combo system, zzfx sound effects, 150-particle cap, and ambient audio. CTO approved, QA verified.

title: Pong Volt Rally Pipeline Started
description: Phase 3 begun — Pong Volt Rally research, pitch, and spec complete. 4-stage rally progression with deuce mechanic and lightning effects.

title: Static Frontend Shipped
description: Config panel removed, backend dependency eliminated. Site runs as pure static on GitHub Pages with no API calls.

title: LittleJS Foundation Complete
description: Phase 1 done — CSS extracted, shared modules built (platform-ui, audio, engine-reset), dual-mode game loader created.

title: All Creative Stage Scripts Done
description: 7/7 creative direction scripts complete with hex codes, timing, particle counts, sound specs, and difficulty curves for every game.

title: Arcade Evolution Pivot Approved
description: Board voted to migrate all 7 games to LittleJS with creative polish. 12 impact assessments consolidated into 5-phase execution plan.

title: Platform Launched
description: Arcade Platform goes live with 7 classic games: Snake, Pong, Breakout, Tetris, Space Invaders, Pac-Man, and Frogger.
